GameText_Skills::comboFinisherSpNote1: Charge your skill gauge by 10% more when completing a combo.
GameText_Skills::comboFinisherSpNote2: Charge your skill gauge by 15% more when completing a combo.
GameText_Skills::barrierNote1: Shields you from any enemy attack, including bosses, once.
GameText_Skills::barrierNote2: Shields you from any enemy attack, including bosses, twice.
GameText_Skills::barrierNote3: Shields you from any enemy attack, including bosses, thrice.
GameText_Skills::ultimate_minNote: Shields you from a killing blow, no matter how strong it is.
GameText_Skills::blastNote1: Shoots a wave of energy towards your target.
GameText_Skills::blastNote2: Increases the damage of the wave by 1.5x.
GameText_Skills::blastNote3: Increases the damage of the wave by 2x.
GameText_Skills::comboFinisherAtkNote1: Increases the damage of the last hit of any combo by 10%.
GameText_Skills::comboFinisherAtkNote2: Increases the damage of the last hit of any combo by 20%.
GameText_Skills::iceRainNote1: Allows Sia to rain down glacial spikes upon her targets.
GameText_Skills::iceRainNote2: Sia's glacial spikes now deal 1.5x damage.
GameText_Skills::iceRainNote3: Sia's glacial spikes now deal 2x damage.
GameText_Skills::iceFrozenNote1: Allows Sia to cast an AOE ice spell that slows down enemies.
GameText_Skills::iceFrozenNote2: Makes enemies slower and lasts 1.5x longer.
GameText_Skills::iceFrozenNote3: Makes enemies even slower and lasts 2x longer.
GameText_Skills::threeswordNote1: Summons 3 swords to spin around you and deal damage to your enemies.
GameText_Skills::threeswordNote2: Increases the damage of Three Swords by 2x.
GameText_Skills::threeswordNote3: Increases the damage of Three Swords by 3x.
GameText_Skills::elemGaugeBoostNote1: Increases the rate you charge the Elemental Gauge by 5%.
GameText_Skills::elemGaugeBoostNote2: Increases the rate you charge the Elemental Gauge by 10%.
GameText_Skills::whirlwindNote1: An AOE attack that damages surrounding enemies.
GameText_Skills::whirlwindNote2: Increases the damage of Whirlwind by 1.5x.
GameText_Skills::whirlwindNote3: Increases the damage of Whirlwind by 2x.
GameText_Skills::comboFinisherHPNote1: Finishing a combo restores a 2% of HP proportionate to your total HP.
GameText_Skills::comboFinisherHPNote2: Finishing a combo restores a 5% of HP proportionate to your total HP.
GameText_Skills::yunaHealAOENote1: Creates a zone of healing that gradually restores your HP.
GameText_Skills::yunaHealAOENote2: Increases the total amount of HP restored by 1.5x. This does not affect the duration of the spell.
GameText_Skills::yunaHealAOENote3: Increases the total amount of HP restored by 2x. This does not affect the duration of the spell.
GameText_Skills::yunaHealNote1: A powerful spell that instantly restores a large amount of HP.
GameText_Skills::yunaHealNote2: Increases the amount of HP restored by 1.5x.
GameText_Skills::yunaHealNote3: Increases the amount of HP restored by 2x.
GameText_Skills::yuna_ultimateNote: A spell that resurrects you to full health. It can only be cast once a day.
GameText_Skills::skillGaugeDiscountNote1: Skills like Stinger, Blast, Three Swords and Whirlwind are 5% cheaper to use.
GameText_Skills::skillGaugeDiscountNote2: Skills like Stinger, Blast, Three Swords and Whirlwind are 10% cheaper to use.
GameText_Skills::skillGaugeDiscountNote3: Skills like Stinger, Blast, Three Swords and Whirlwind are 15% cheaper to use.
GameText_Skills::skillGaugeDiscountNote4: Skills like Stinger, Blast, Three Swords and Whirlwind are 20% cheaper to use.
GameText_Skills::skillGaugeDiscountNote5: Skills like Stinger, Blast, Three Swords and Whirlwind are 25% cheaper to use.
GameText_Skills::stingerNote1: A powerful sword thrust that moves you closer to enemies while also damaging them.
GameText_Skills::stingerNote2: Increases the damage of the Stinger by x1.5.
GameText_Skills::stingerNote3: Increases the damage of the Stinger by x2.
GameText_Skills::elemLightNote1: A "Light" elemental attack that breaks through Thunder barriers.
GameText_Skills::elemLightNote2: Increases the amount of hits to two and damage by 30%.
GameText_Skills::elemLightNote3: Increases the amount of hits to three and damage by 50%.
GameText_Skills::elemThunderNote1: A "Thunder" elemental attack that breaks through "Light" barriers.
GameText_Skills::elemThunderNote2: Increases the damage of Elemental Thunder by 5%.
GameText_Skills::elemThunderNote3: Increases the amount of hits to two and damage by 10%.
GameText_Skills::elemThunderNote4: Increases the damage of Elemental Thunder by 15%.
GameText_Skills::elemThunderNote5: Increases the damage of Elemental Thunder by 20%.
GameText_Skills::elemThunderNote6: Increases the damage of Elemental Thunder by 25%.
GameText_Skills::elemThunderNote7: Increases the amount of hits to three and damage by 30%.
GameText_Skills::elemIceNote1: An "Ice" elemental attack that breaks through Fire barriers.
GameText_Skills::elemIceNote2: Increases the damage of Elemental Ice by 5%.
GameText_Skills::elemIceNote3: Increases the amount of hits to two and damage by 10%.
GameText_Skills::elemIceNote4: Increases the damage of Elemental Ice by 15%.
GameText_Skills::elemIceNote5: Increases the damage of Elemental Ice by 20%.
GameText_Skills::elemIceNote6: Increases the damage of Elemental Ice by 25%.
GameText_Skills::elemIceNote7: Increases the amount of hits to three and damage by 30%.
GameText_Skills::elemFireNote1: A "Fire" elemental attack that breaks through Ice barriers.
GameText_Skills::elemFireNote2: Increases the damage of Elemental Fire by 5%.
GameText_Skills::elemFireNote3: Increases the amount of hits to two and damage by 10%.
GameText_Skills::elemFireNote4: Increases the damage of Elemental Fire by 15%.
GameText_Skills::elemFireNote5: Increases the damage of Elemental Fire by 20%.
GameText_Skills::elemFireNote6: Increases the damage of Elemental Fire by 25%.
GameText_Skills::elemFireNote7: Increases the amount of hits to two and damage by 30%.
GameText_Skills::dodgeNote: Allows you to dodge and, when executed perfectly, slow down time.
GameText_Skills::enduranceNote: Allows you to withstand one extra hit before dying.
GameText_Skills::parryNote: Allows you to "parry" enemy attacks. When done succesfully, it gives you a boost to your DeathBlow gauge.
GameText_Skills::greatSwordNote: Allows you to do heavy attacks capable of penetrating enemy shields.
GameText_Skills::deathBlowNote: A devastatingly deadly attack that can be performed once you’ve built up a long enough chain of attacks.
GameText_Skills::allOutAttackNote: An attack that can break "any" kind of barrier.
GameText_Tutorial::tutorialAttackDescrip: Attack Press the {Attack} button to attack and create combos with your sword. Press {CombatQTE} at the end of combos to inflict extra damage on the enemy.
GameText_Tutorial::tutorialLockOnDescrip: Lock On Press {LockOn} to lock on to the enemy. To swap between targets, tilt the right stick {CameraMove} to the left or right.
GameText_Tutorial::tutorialDodgeDescript: Perfect Dodge Dodging right before an enemy attack causes time to slow down . In order to execute a perfect dodge press {Dodge} when you see a red ping from an enemy.
GameText_Tutorial::tutorialElementalFist: Elemental Fist The Elemental Fist is what allows you to break enemy Barriers. In order to use it, you must first charge your Elemental Gauge through attacks or Perfect Dodges.
GameText_Tutorial::tutorialWeaknessDescr: Weakness The only way to break an enemy's barrier is to use the correct Elemental type (see to the left). Some monsters have Stronger Barriers that require multiple strikes from the Elemental Fist. The stronger your bond with your confidants is, the more times your elemental fist will strike the barrier.
GameText_Tutorial::tutorialFastTravelDes: Fast Travel There are cellphones spread throughout a dungeon. You can use these to access the fast travel menu and travel to areas you've visited before.
GameText_Tutorial::tutorialDateableSkill: Confidant Skills While in battle press {ToggleMenu_Paradigm} to see what Confidant Skills you can use.
GameText_Tutorial::tutorialEssenceDescri: Skill Tree You can upgrade your skills in the Skill Tree. Use {CreateMenu} to access the Skill Tree through the main menu.
GameText_Tutorial::tutorialCalendarDescr: Calendar Gameplay You are free to spend your day as you’d like. However, you don’t have unlimited time. The Wall must be dealt with before the Timer runs out. You can talk to Aria at the Hologram Station to go to the Wall.
GameText_Tutorial::tutorialStingerDescri: Stinger Press {Skill_Stinger} while holding {CombatRightShoulder} to use the Stinger. A powerful sword thrust that moves you closer to enemies while also damaging them. Tip - This skill knocks down enemies.
GameText_Tutorial::tutorialBlastDescript: Blast Press {Skill_Shoot} while holding {CombatRightShoulder} to shoot a damaging wave of energy towards your target. Tip - This skill knocks down enemies.
GameText_Tutorial::tutorialAOEDescriptio: Whirlwind Press {Skill_Whirlwind} while holding {CombatRightShoulder} to use Whirlwind. Whirlwind is an AOE attack that damages surrounding enemies. Tip - This skill knocks down enemies.
GameText_Tutorial::tutorialThreeSwordDes: Three Sword Press {Skill_ThreeSword} while holding {CombatRightShoulder} to summon three swords that damage enemies in your immediate area.
GameText_Tutorial::tutorialGreatSwordDes: Great Sword Press {AttackStrong} to use the Great Sword. Great sword attacks are capable of penetrating through enemy shields.
GameText_Tutorial::tutorialDeathBlowDesc: Deathblow Allows you to deal devastating damage to a target enemy. Press {Deathblow} when you see the Deathblow indicator, which will appear once you've chained together a long enough combo.
GameText_Tutorial::tutorialAllOutAttackD: All Out Attack “All out attack” allows you to destroy any type of barrier. You can activate this skill by pressing the {CombatLeftShoulder} and the {CombatRightShoulder} together, but only after you've already used 4 elemental attacks.
GameText_Tutorial::tutorialAllOutSprintD: Sprint While running, Press and hold down {CombatSprint} firmly to sprint. OR While running, Press {CombatSprint} once to sprint.
GameText_Tutorial::tutorialCalendarGamep: Calendar Gameplay 2 You are unable to go to the wall at night. So, remember to plan accordingly. Spend time with your confidants in order to become more powerful.
GameText_Tutorial::tutorialWalkQuitely: Walk Quietly Gently push the left stick {CombatMove} forward to walk quietly.
GameText_Tutorial::tutorialSiaBike: Sia’s Ballcycle Use the left stick {CombatMove} to control the bike and avoid obstacles. Press the {SiaBikeAttack} button to send out barrier destroying slashes.
GameText_Tutorial::tutorialSiaRoom: Sia’s Lab When you want to talk to Sia, you can visit her in her lab towards the front of the train.
GameText_Tutorial::tutorialDateableSkill: AOE Heal Yuna creates a stationary heal area.
Ice Rain Sia rains down sharp, damaging, ice glacials on top of your enemies.
Min Barrier Min summons a shield that protects you from a single enemy attack, regardless of how powerful that attack is.
GameText_Tutorial::tutorialYohanRoom: Yohan’s Car When you want to talk to Yohan, you can visit him in his car, which is right next to Sia’s.
GameText_Tutorial::tutorialSave: Save You can save your progress near fast travel points. Use {CreateMenu} to access the Save through the main menu. The game autosaves frequently. You can find this save at the top of the load list.
GameText_Tutorial::tutorialCh3Plan: Precious Memories These are the last days you will get to spend with these characters. Try and see if you can deepen your relationship with at least one character.
GameText_Tutorial::tutorialText_Elementa: Charged Elemental Fist Press {ToggleMenu_ElementalFist} to use the Elemental Fist and break enemy Barriers.
GameText_Tutorial::tutorialText_QTE_desc: QTE Press {QTEButtonDown} when the outer circle reaches within the colored range.
GameText_Tutorial::tutorialParry: Parry Pressing {Deathblow} right before an enemy attack, visualized by the blue ping, will parry that attack. Successful parrys give you a boost to your DeathBlow gauge and stuns the enemy.
GameText_Tutorial::tutorialSocialStatDes: Social Stats The way you respond will increase different Social Stats. They are what allow you to take your relationship with your confidant to the next level.
GameText_Tutorial::tutorialElemFistAddit: The <color=#FCE58A>Elemental Gauge</color> is at the top left of the game screen next to the HP.
GameText_Tutorial::tutorial_us_min: Min’s Ultimate Skill Min will save you from a fatal blow with her shield. This skill can only be activated once a day.
GameText_Tutorial::tutorial_us_yuna: Yuna Ultimate Skill If you fall in battle, Yuna will resurrect you to full health. This skill can only be activated once a day.
GameText_Tutorial::tutorial_us_sia: Sia Ultimate Skill Sia will protect you from death with her freeze. This skill can only be activated once a day.
GameText_Tutorial::tutorialBreakingBarri: Barrier Breaking Use your Elemental Fist to break through a monster's barriers.
GameText_Tutorial::tutorialWhiteEssenceD: White Essence White Essence allows you to unlock confidant skills. Tip - You can gain White Essence by training or scavenging with your confidants.
GameText_Tutorial::tutorialBlackEssenceD: Black Essence Black Essence allows you to unlock sword skills. Tip - You gather Black Essence by finding it in dungeons or killing powerful monsters.
GameText_Tutorial::tutorialCombatStatDes: Scavenging & Combat Stats You can increase certain Combat Stats by going to the city and scavenging. Depending on what character you choose, different stats will be increased. You can Go Scavenging with the character by talking to them at night.
GameText_Tutorial::tutorialDodgeReminder: Perfect Dodge Reminder Dodging right before an enemy attack causes time to slow down. Press the {Dodge} when you see a red ping.
GameText_Tutorial::tutorial_MinigameYuna: Breath Training Tap the {MiniGame_DoAction} button to position yourself on the breathing pillar. Where you are on the breathing pillar will periodically be subtracted from your total. Your goal is to hit zero. If you fall below zero, your breath will not count and you will not get a point.
GameText_Tutorial::tutorial_MinigameMin: Squat Session Press the buttons shown in the right order in order to perform squats. Show Min that you deserve to be her coach by doing more squats than her!
GameText_Tutorial::tutorial_MinigameSia: Cell Dividing Split up the cells into their correct categories! Red cells go to the left. Blue cells go to right! Sia, on the other hand, goes to relax in the corner.
GameText_Tutorial::tutorial_MinigameYoha: Meditation Click on good “thoughts” while trying to avoid clicking on bad “thoughts”! Warning: these are good and bad thoughts according to Yohan, a lovable rascal.
GameText_Tutorial::tutorial_yuna_heal: Instant Heal Yuna will heal you instantly.
GameText_Tutorial::tutorial_sia_freeze: Freeze Sia will blast your enemies with ice to slow down them down.
GameText_Tutorial::tutorial_min_airburst: Stun Wave Min will create a strong airburst that stuns surrounding enemies.
GameText_Tutorial::tutorialNeedRelations: Relationship Points How you respond to confidants give you Relationship Points. They, along with Social Stats, are what allow you to take your relationship with your confidant to the next level. You can also gather relationship points by eitherSpend Time or Training with them.
GameText_Tutorial::tutorialWalkQuitelyPC: Walk Quietly Gently press {WalkQuite} and use {CombatMove} to walk quietly.
GameText_Tutorial::tutorialThreeSwordDes: Three Sword Press {Skill_ThreeSword} to summon three swords that damage enemies in your immediate area.
GameText_Tutorial::tutorialBlastDescript: Blast Press {Skill_Shoot} to shoot a damaging wave of energy towards your target. Tip - This skill knocks down enemies.
GameText_Tutorial::tutorialStingerDescri: Stinger Press {Skill_Stinger} to use the Stinger. A powerful sword thrust that moves you closer to enemies while also damaging them. Tip - This skill knocks down enemies.
GameText_Tutorial::tutorialWhirlwindDesc: Whirlwind Press {Skill_Whirlwind} to use Whirlwind. Whirlwind is an AOE attack that damages surrounding enemies. Tip - This skill knocks down enemies.
GameText_Tutorial::tutorialAllOutAttackD: All Out Attack “All out attack” allows you to destroy any type of barrier. You can activate this skill by pressing {AllOutAttackPC}, but only after you've already used 4 elemental attacks.
GameText_Tutorial::tutorialLockOnDescrip: Lock On Press {LockOn} to lock on to the enemy. To swap between targets, press {LockOnTargetSwapL} or {LockOnTargetSwapR}.
GameText_Tutorial::tutorialSkillUnlock: Unlock skills! Remember, you can unlock skills like Deathblow or Great Sword. Use {CreateMenu} to access the Skill Tree through the main menu.
GameText_Achievement::trophy_1st_bond_de: The start of a peculiar bond.
GameText_Achievement::trophy_city_explor: You explored the city for the first time.
GameText_Achievement::trophy_hand_master: You got creative with your hand.
GameText_Achievement::trophy_first_wall_: You helped Yuna destroy the first wall.
GameText_Achievement::trophy_piggyback_e: Now you know how to give proper piggyback rides.
GameText_Achievement::trophy_second_wall: You helped Min break through the second wall.
GameText_Achievement::trophy_bond_maniac: Reach max rank with all your confidants.
GameText_Achievement::trophy_true_suppor: Reach max rank with a Confidant.
GameText_Achievement::trophy_promise_yun: You made a promise with Yuna
GameText_Achievement::trophy_promise_min: You made a promise with Min
GameText_Achievement::trophy_promise_yoh: You made a promise with Yohan
GameText_Achievement::trophy_promise_sia: You made a promise with Sia
GameText_Achievement::trophy_romantist_d: Going out with 1 person only til the end
GameText_Achievement::trophy_plushboy_de: You went on all of Min's dates.
GameText_Achievement::trophy_dreamboat_d: You went on all of Yohan's dates.
GameText_Achievement::trophy_truebro_des: You went on all of Chani's dates.
GameText_Achievement::trophy_tentacleman: You went on all of Yuna's dates.
GameText_Achievement::trophy_loveassista: You went on all of Sia's dates.
GameText_PersonalityTest::personalityTes: You are at the beginning of an adventure, which companion would you bring with you?
During your travels, you and your companion are tired and need to rest. Where do you decide to spend the night?
You and your companion find a basket capable of creating any and all kinds of food out of thin air. What do you do?

On your way home, you are ambushed. They grab the basket and your companion and run in opposite directions. 
What do you do?
GameText_Texts::CH01_SNS_POST_YUNA_01: I know somewhere safe! Here are the coordinates
GameText_Texts::CH01_SNS_POST_YUNA_02: Bring the plushy to prove you're human.
GameText_Texts::CH01_SNS_REPLY_USER_01: I knew Yuna would help us!
GameText_Texts::CH01_SNS_REPLY_USER_02: Yuna’s save the world concert confirmed?
GameText_Texts::CH01_SNS_REPLY_USER_03: She really cares about her fans!
GameText_Texts::CH01_SNS_REPLY_USER_05: Yuna we will follow you where-ever!
GameText_Texts::CH01_SNS_MSG_HACK_01: Click here to claim your own super all mighty power!
GameText_Texts::CH01_SNS_MSG_HACK_02: Information saves lives. Grant us access to your social media account.
GameText_Texts::CH01_SNS_MSG_HACK_04: Do you want power? Click on the link below!
GameText_Texts::CH02_SNS_MSG_HACK_05: Do you want food? Click on the link below!
GameText_Texts::act1_1_lore: Your Journey Begins When the monsters appeared, you hid in the shelter, but more came. As you fled, a strange woman ripped off your arm. On the verge of death, Lux, a divine being, offered you her tremendous power, which you accepted. After using that power to save your’s, Yuna’s and Chani’s lives, you began your journey to retrieve The Stone.
GameText_Texts::act2_1_lore: Hackers and Heroes After escaping the wall, you discovered that Chani was the reason you crashed into it. Yuna shared with you that she has a past full of regrets, how she wished she defended her friend. Aria told you there is a monster trying to hack into your train and that you must destroy his servers if you are to have any chance of retrieving The Stone in time.
GameText_Texts::act2_2_lore: A Spirit Strained Yuna was close to giving up after she discovered that she was “responsible” for the death of her fans. However, Aria convinced her to keep trying. After pushing herself too hard, Yuna destroyed the wall. However, something happened to her… something dangerous. As you celebrated your victory over the wall, you encountered Sia.
GameText_Texts::act3_1_lore: Haunted by the Past Inside the second wall, you met Min. A girl haunted by the deaths of her friends and her own inaction. On the train, you've started helping Sia with her research, in hopes of learning something about the wall, or yourself, that might prove helpful. Unfortunately, you discovered that the wall standing in your way is on the verge of becoming indestructible.
GameText_Texts::act3_2_lore: A Heart Healed After destroying two of the cores, the third one evolved into a monster and in desperation fused itself with the wall. Through the power of teamwork, and turning Min into a battering ram, they destroyed the wall. Destroying the wall, speaking with her friends, healed Min's heart. And afterwards, while celebrating their victory, Min was officially accepted into the team.
GameText_Texts::act4_1_lore: Dreams and Reality Collide You discovered that the man from your dreams works for Lux and is named Yohan. He told you that Delia has begun the Totem Ritual and that there is not much time left before Umbra awakens. You are tasked with retrieving The Stone as he prepares the Totem Ritual and the Cannon.
GameText_Texts::act4_2_lore: A Hollow Husk Delia was defeated and The Stone retrieved. Tragically, Ran, Sia’s mentor, was murdered by Delia. Sia, heartbroken, was comforted by the fact that Ran had a list of things Sia wanted to do. Sia decided that she is going to do the things on this list, and that you are coming with her. Now, all there is to do is wait until Yohan has finished the Totem Ritual in order to return the world to normal.
GameText_Texts::normalWorldPosts: (People's SNS post about world came back to normal)
GameText_Texts::gameTextBeginNote: It is strongly recommended to play this game with a controller.
GameText_Texts::storyIntro_Chat2: This is actually my first dating app date
GameText_Texts::txtWarning: This game contains flashing imagery, adult themes, violence, blood and gore that some players may find disturbing.
